prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约9775名→9436名→10600名→11329名→6667名。2021–2024年位次在9400–11300区间波动，整体呈后移趋势；2025年新 高考首年（物理类）位次大幅前移至6667名，较2024年提升约4662名，属结构性变化；该校在内蒙古理科组招生计划：2021年29人、2022年27人、2023年29人、 2024年31人、2025年31人、2026年31人。2025–2026年计划持平，无扩缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西北大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约 第70名（2021年第64名→2025年第70名），近年排名稳定在64–70区间，属中上游211层次；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及文学院副教授贾浅浅被 举报抄袭事件，学校已成立工作专班调查；抖音热度排名第81位（总106所），评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高，未见明显报考升温信号；第五轮学科评 估中，地质学获评A、考古学获评A、软件工程获评A-，均为该校王牌学科，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业 社会热度持续偏热/高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专业（电子信息类、物理学类、化工与制药类等）部分重合；内蒙古2026年高考总报名人数约154000人，较2025年（历史类32644 +物理类83716=116360人）大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算约110880人，竞争显著加剧；西北大学位于陕西西安，与内蒙 古相邻，属西北地区优质211，对内蒙古考生有较强的地域吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生计划占比较小（约31人），属省外招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅 前移（6667名）的结构性变化、2026年招生计划持平、本省物理类考生总数预计增长约32%导致竞争加剧、声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般等因素，在2025年基准6667名基础上预计竞 争进一步加剧，位次小幅前移。预测2026年理科（物理类）最低位次约6467名，区间5967–6967名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 9775 → 9436 → 10600 → 11329 → 6667. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated within the 9400–11300 range, showing an overall backward trend; in 2025, the first year of the new college entrance exam (physics category), the ranking significantly advanced to 6667, an increase of about 4662 places compared to 2024, indicating a structural change. The university's enrollment plan for science groups in Inner Mongolia: 29 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 31 in 2024, 31 in 2025, and 31 in 2026. The plan remains stable from 2025 to 2026, with no signals of expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 70th (64th in 2021 → 70th in 2025), with rankings stable in the 64–70 range in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. During the 2026 college entrance exam cycle, its reputation is somewhat negative, mainly involving the plagiarism accusation against Jia Qianqian, an associate professor in the School of Literature, for which the university has established a special task force to investigate. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 81st (out of 106 total), rated as "average," with low attention on short video platforms and no obvious signs of rising application heat. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, geology received an A, archaeology an A, and software engineering an A-, all of which are the university's flagship disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly popular/recommended, partially overlapping with the university's physics category enrollment majors (e.g., electronic information, physics, chemical engineering and pharmaceuticals). In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (history category 32,644 + physics category 83,716 = 116,360), with an estimated 110,880 physics category examinees, leading to intensified competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Inner Mongolia, and is a high-quality 211 university in the northwest region, exerting strong regional appeal to Inner Mongolian candidates. Its enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia is relatively small (about 31 students), making it an out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the structural change of a significant ranking advance in the first year of the new college entrance exam in 2025 (6667), the stable enrollment plan for 2026, the estimated 32% increase in the number of physics category examinees in the province leading to intensified competition, the negative reputation, and average Douyin popularity, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 6667, with a slight ranking advance. The predicted minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 is approximately 6467, with a range of 5967–6967.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 6467, with a range of 5967–6967. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<5967), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>6967), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranked Tier 2 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 4242 → 1236 → 2184 → 1479 → 1530. In 2021, the ranking was relatively high (4242), then moved significantly forward to 1236 in 2022, fluctuating between 1479 and 2184 thereafter, stabilizing around 1530 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts groups in Inner Mongolia: 14 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 13 in 2025, and 13 in 2026. The plan remains unchanged from 2025 to 2026, with no signal of expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 70th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities with profound liberal arts heritage. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to the Jia Qianqian plagiarism incident), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 81st (out of 106 total), rated as 'average', with no obvious warming signal for applications. Archaeology received an A rating (fifth round), making it the flagship discipline of Northwest University. In 2026, the history category enrollment includes the archaeology major (1 planned spot), which has strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. Although majors like Chinese Language and Literature, History, etc., did not receive A ratings, the university's overall strength in liberal arts is relatively strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular/recommended liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature align with the university's history category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, etc.). In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam registrants in Inner Mongolia is approximately 154,000, with history category candidates estimated at about 43,120 (approximately 28%), an increase of about 32% compared to 32,644 in 2025, intensifying competition. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Inner Mongolia, offering strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Inner Mongolia is only 13 spots, a small-scale enrollment from outside the province, making ranking fluctuations relatively sensitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 benchmark ranking of 1530, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, an estimated 32% increase in the number of history category candidates in the province leading to intensified competition, and a somewhat negative reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify compared to the 2025 benchmark, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts (history category) is approximately 1500, with a range of 1230–1770.
